search_query: Inductor's pattern matcher silently replaces reshape with view, which changes semantics when my tensor isn't contiguous. Is this a bug?

results.title: For beginners: Do not use view() or reshape() to swap dimensions of tensors!
How To Reshape A Tensor In PyTorch?
